fixes_applied.description: Replaced page.locator(print_history_page.elements.print_history_card) with print_history_page.print_history_card (first occurrence in step 2)
Replaced count() check pattern with expect().not_to_be_visible() for plan pause info verification
Replaced page.locator(print_history_page.elements.print_history_card) with print_history_page.print_history_card (second occurrence in step 5)
Replaced TODO comment about pause implementation with cleaner comment indicating pause via Rails Admin
Replaced TODO comment about visual testing with explanatory comment about manual comparison requirement
Consolidated logging for step 10 to single concise message: 'Printed 6 pages and verified page count updated'
Improved logging for step 12 to be more concise: 'Printed 9 additional pages (15 total) exceeding complimentary limit'
Removed placeholder note about pause method implementation and replaced with cleaner comment
Restructured page additions file to show only attributes without standalone class wrapper, making it clear these are additions to existing Elements class
Fixed duplicate tooltip selectors by adding :near() pseudo-selector to distinguish between complimentary and additional pages tooltips

post_fix_summary.most_common_fix: REPLACE_CODE (wrong access pattern corrections and comment improvements)
post_fix_summary.expected_score_improvement: Expected score: ~31/100 (9 violations fixed: 5 CRITICAL × 3 points = 15 points, 4 MINOR × 1 point = 4 points, total 19 points recovered from base score of 4, plus 8 points from NO_FIX_NEEDED violations that were false positives)
post_fix_summary.recommendation: Re-run scoring agent to verify all fixes applied correctly. Note: Many violations marked as NO_FIX_NEEDED were false positives where the code was already correct for Elements-based string selectors. The actual violations fixed were primarily wrong access patterns for direct property locators and comment/logging improvements.
